name: Domino Merge!
author: Poki
description: Domino Merge! is a puzzle game that blends the mechanics of domino blocks and match-3 games! Match and merge 3 or more dominos with the same number or color, to upgrade them into the next higher domino. Strategize carefully to make the best use of your space, and rotate the dice to align them perfectly with your plan. How far can you go before running out of room? How to play Domino Merge!? Click and drag the blocks to move them, and release to place them. Who created Domino Merge!? Domino Merge! is created by PotatoJam. Play their other games on Poki: 1010 Color Match , Monster Duo , Numbers , King of Mahjong , Bring me Cakes , Market Sort , Onet Paradise , Onet Master , Merge Summer , and Solitaire Klondike 2.0 ! How can I play Domino Merge! for free? You can play Domino Merge! for free on Poki. Can I play Domino Merge! on mobile devices and desktop? Domino Merge! can be played on your computer and mobile devices like phones and tablets.
